clusters.title: What is a super El Niño?
clusters.neutral_headline: What is a super El Niño

items.title: What is a super El Niño?
items.standfirst: Forecasts are predicting that a "super" El Niño could form later this year. The severity of these weather patterns tends to depend on ocean temperatures, which we know are rising. So, there are fears this could be the strongest El Niño ever. But what exactly is that going to look like for Australia and the world?
items.content: Forecasts are predicting that a "super" El Niño could form later this year. The severity of these weather patterns tends to depend on ocean temperatures, which we know are rising. So, there are fears this could be the strongest El Niño ever. But what exactly is that going to look like for Australia and the world?
